description: CONTROL ARM (ADR-0006, registered at the M14 evidence-throughput expansion). Always-long BTC at the standard 5% allocation with the maximum permitted crash stop. Exists so every other candidate's forward record has a passive baseline: a future forward-evidence pass must beat THIS, not just zero, or it is market beta in a costume. Not a trading recommendation.

tracking.prediction: This candidate earns approximately BTC beta minus one round trip of costs: its forward record mirrors BTC's price path at 5% allocation, re-entering after any 50% crash stop. It is the bar to clear - a candidate qualifying under protocol v2 while underperforming this benchmark over the same window is beta plus noise and must not be promoted.
